rulings.Case Title: DOMENIC J CANNIZZARO et al VS. FRED P RICHARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 04, 2014 line 1. INTERVENOR ROBERT RICHARD II's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6 GRANTED. The Court orders Domenic Cannizzaro, Carmel Richard, Ann Gervasi, and Fred Richard to pay sanctions and fees in the amount of $4,525. Additionally, the Court orders Domenic Cannizzaro, Carmel Richard, Ann Gervasi, and Fred Richard to execute the documents submitted by the intervenor forthwith. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: NATALIA KHORUZHENKO VS. ALAN WU KONG TAN, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication; Index Of Evidence
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 04, 2014 line 2. DEFENDANTS WING FONG, YUEN FONG, WONG, CHEE MEE C., INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL, RUE, RONALD, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNER, THE"140 GARDENSIDE" GENERAL PARTNERSHIP, ALAN KONG TAN, JENNY TAN and BEN NG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication; Index Of Evidence GRANTED in part as to the following causes of action: 5th cause of action for violation of Civil Code section 789.3; 9th cause of action for conversion; 11th cause of action for conversion; 12th cause of action for negligent infliction of emotional distress; 14th cause of action for trespass; 15th cause of action for negligence invasion of privacy; and 16th cause of action for intentional invasion of privacy. DENIED in part as to the following causes of action: 1st cause of action for negligence; 2nd cause of action for wrongful eviction; 3rd cause of action for breach of covenant of quiet enjoyment; 4th cause of action for tenant harassment; 6th cause of action for breach of contract; 7th cause of action for breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing; 8th cause of action for unfair business practices; 10th cause of action for failure to provide accounting or refund of a security deposit; 13th cause of action for intentional infliction of emotional distress; and as to plaintiff's claim fro punitive damages. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: JULES RADCLIFFE et al VS. PHUONG PHAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 04, 2014 line 3. DEFENDANT PHUONG PHAM's MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED pursuant to stipulation of all parties to November 7, 2014. Additionally, Defendant failed to attach a copy of the third amended complaint pursuant to SF Local Rules 2.6C. The Court orders Defendant to provide a courtesy copy of the third amended complaint to Department 501 forthwith. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE BOURGES VS. DANY SCHER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment Defendant'S 4th Demurrer With Leave To Amend Plaintiff'S 5th Complaint, Vacate Judgment On Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 04, 2014 line 4. PLAINTIFF CONSTANCE BOURGES's Motion To Vacate Judgment Defendant'S 4th Demurrer With Leave To Amend Plaintiff'S 5th Complaint, Vacate Judgment On Sanctions Hearing required on Plaintiff's Motion to vacate judgment. Defendant is ordered to produce a file endorsed copy of the demurrer to Plaintiff's fourth amended complaint.= (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ALENE YOUNG VS. NANCY WILLIAMS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 04, 2014 line 5. PLAINTIFF ALENE YOUNG's Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions CONTINUED to November 18, 2014, on the Court's own motion. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: JCS PROPERTIES LLC VS. EDWARD NOVACK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 04, 2014 line 6. DEFENDANT EDWARD NOVACK's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND OFF CALENDAR. Motion is untimely. Defendant must follow the notice requirements for a regularly noticed motion. See CCP § 1005.= (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: NANCY Y WILLLIAMS VS. ALENE YOUNG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 04, 2014 line 7. DEFENDANT ALENE YOUNG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT CONTINUED to November 18, 2014. Plaintiff filed an opposition to Defendant's demurrer but failed to provide courtesy copies to Department 501. See SF Local Rules 2.6B. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: AUDREY WONG JEONG, TRUSTEE OF THE AUDREY WONG VS. RUI QUIONG CHEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 04, 2014 line 8. DEFENDANT RUI CHEN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. = (501/LOT)
